exif.ImageDescription: An Afghan elder and his cat, sit outside his store, at the Anaba Bazaar, in the Panjshir province, Afghanistan, Jan. 2, 2010. The Anaba Bazaar is a very prosperous location for businessmen because of the stable security within the Panjshir province. (U.S. Army photo by Sgt. Teddy Wade/Released)
Calico cat photographed in Assisi, Italy.

exif.Copyright: D.G. Pet' Photo Studio All Right Reserved
Creative Commons CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain

exif.ImageDescription: Nikiszowiec, a historic workers' settlement in Katowice, is known for its brick buildings from the early 20th century, which have been protected as a historical monument since 2011. The chimneys of Dalkia Polska Energia can be seen in the background.
Spitzweg, Carl; Mountain Landscape; The Ashmolean Museum of Art and Archaeology; http://www.artuk.org/artworks/mountain-landscape-142785
exif.Copyright: Copyright information and licence terms for this image can be found on the Art UK website at http://www.artuk.org/artworks/142785
